svg.text: API key must begin with sk-
fails → reject immediately, response not forwarded to tunnel
key not found or revoked → reject
per-key model allowlist · claude-only keys blocked from image gen models
model not on key's allowlist → reject
60 RPM / 200K TPM default per key · checked in-memory
window exceeded → reject with Retry-After header
$5/day default budget if configured · spend read from PostgreSQL
map model name → Bedrock ARN + region
eu.* prefix for EU · us-east-1 / us-west-2 for image models
attach IAM role credentials · forward to Bedrock endpoint
path not on allowlist · blocked before tunnel
missing or invalid CF-Access service token
key does not start with sk-
hashed key absent or revoked in PostgreSQL
spend not logged for rejected requests
key restricted to specific model subset
e.g. claude-only key used with nova-canvas
daily spend limit reached for this key
Video Sidecar Processing (alternate path from Step 4 when /v1/videos/*)
a. Auth: validate key via LiteLLM /key/info
sidecar calls LiteLLM :4000/key/info with master key · gets spend + budget info
b. Validation: prompt, shots, duration, image
Nova Reel: 6-120s · multi-shot 2-20 × 6s · Luma Ray2: 5s or 9s
model-specific image constraints · cannot mix prompt + shots (Nova Reel)
c. Budget Check: estimated_cost vs remaining
Nova Reel: $0.08/s · Ray2: $0.75-1.50/s · checks remaining budget from key info
estimated cost exceeds remaining budget → 402 Payment Required
d. Concurrent Job Limit: max 3 in-progress per key (atomic)
advisory lock + count + insert in single transaction (no TOCTOU race)
e. Bedrock StartAsyncInvoke → Nova Reel (us-east-1) or Luma Ray2 (us-west-2)
per-model region routing · MP4 output → region-matched S3 bucket
Bedrock error → 502 · returns invocationArn on success
insert into rockport_video_jobs · status=in_progress · returns 202 with job_id
key validated via LiteLLM /key/info (not direct DB)
bad duration, invalid image, mixed prompt+shots
image must be exactly 1280x720 PNG or JPEG
estimated cost exceeds remaining key budget
rockport · request data flow · cloudflare tunnel · litellm proxy · video sidecar · aws bedrock
